sizing_rule.note: Only trade if minimum position size required for wide stop-loss does not exceed 2% of account equity. Risk is capped at max_risk_per_trade_pct_of_account (0.02 or 2%).

source_rule_text: A trader should only trade an instrument if the minimum position size required to respect a wide stop-loss does not represent an unacceptably large dollar amount relative to their account or risk tolerance.
